secondary_archetype: Enterprise GTM Operations / Chief of Staff-adjacent

seniority.level: Senior IC / Lead (likely equivalent to Staff or Senior Lead)
level_signals: 8–12+ years of experience in strategy, operations, consulting, finance, BizOps, or a similarly rigorous operating role
Embedded partner to the Global Head of Enterprise & Key Accounts (senior executive partner)
Base salary range $108,800–$160,000 consistent with Senior IC / Lead contributor
Described as 'force multiplier for leadership teams'

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 8–12+ years of experience in strategy, operations, consulting, finance, BizOps, or a similarly rigorous operating role
You bring strong analytical depth and are comfortable working directly with data (SQL, Looker, Excel/Sheets)
You have a bias for action and thrive in ambiguous, fast-paced environments
You are a systems thinker who enjoys building structure where none exists
You can operate credibly with senior executives while staying close to operational detail
You take ownership of outcomes and are comfortable being accountable for both the strategy and the execution
You are energized by being a generalist and a force multiplier for leadership teams
Develop and maintain analytical views of enterprise performance using tools like Looker, SQL, Salesforce, and Sheets
Own cross-functional execution on key initiatives spanning Sales, Customer Success, RevOps, Analytics, Finance, and Product
Design and stand up the operating model for Enterprise & Key Accounts, including dashboards, tracking mechanisms, and performance cadences

scope.surface: Enterprise & Key Accounts (ENT/KA) business at SevenRooms (DoorDash In-Store organization), covering restaurant groups and hospitality operators globally
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / enterprise GTM — SevenRooms product sold to restaurant and hospitality operators
primary_metrics_inferred: Revenue and retention performance for ENT/KA accounts
Efficiency and scalability of enterprise operating model
core_responsibilities: Design and stand up the operating model for Enterprise & Key Accounts, including dashboards, tracking mechanisms, and performance cadences
Translate enterprise GTM strategy into durable systems across pipeline, lead segmentation, whitespace analysis, and account coverage
Partner with enterprise leadership to define priorities, goals, and success metrics
Identify the highest-leverage opportunities to improve visibility, efficiency, and execution across the business
Own cross-functional execution on key initiatives spanning Sales, Customer Success, RevOps, Analytics, Finance, and Product
Develop and maintain analytical views of enterprise performance using tools like Looker, SQL, Salesforce, and Sheets
Prototype and pressure-test new processes before partnering with central teams to harden and institutionalize them
Remove friction from day-to-day execution by building clear ownership, structure, and repeatable processes

green_flags: Compensation range clearly disclosed — both base ($108,800–$160,000) and OTE ($136,000–$200,000)
Equity grants mentioned as part of compensation package
Well-defined scope: embedded partner to Global Head of ENT/KA at SevenRooms
Role is genuinely build-oriented — stands up infrastructure for a real, scaled enterprise business
Explicit cross-functional partners named (Sales, CS, RevOps, Analytics, Finance, Product)
Encourages inclusive hiring and explicitly welcomes diverse candidates
red_flags: Location type not stated in JD — work arrangement (remote, hybrid, onsite) is unclear and not specified anywhere
Role carries sales commission component ('opportunities for equity grants and sales commission') despite being an ops/BizOps role — scope of commission ownership is ambiguous
8–12+ years is a fairly wide band; the '+' signals no ceiling, which could indicate this role is being pitched broadly
No direct reports stated — seniority may feel lower than 8–12 years of experience typically commands without people management scope

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required + comp range + executive partner framing)
scope.business_model (inferred from SevenRooms product and enterprise restaurant/hospitality context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (not explicitly stated; inferred from responsibilities)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from 'base salary is localized according to employee work location' language)
ambiguities: Job description does not specify work location or arrangement (remote, hybrid, onsite). No cities are named for this role specifically, though the company operates in San Francisco and Los Angeles (mentioned only in fair chance ordinance boilerplate, not as role locations).

Compensation includes 'sales commission' for what is described as an operations/BizOps role — unclear whether this is a standard DoorDash classification artifact or a meaningful commission component tied to enterprise revenue.
The role is embedded in SevenRooms (a DoorDash acquisition) under the In-Store org — team branding and reporting lines may differ from standard DoorDash structures.
